content:
Hi, I’m new to kernel/Rust-for-Linux and interested in issue #1217.
Before starting, I wanted to check: has anyone already sent a patch for this to the mailing list, or is it still being worked on?

One of the best ways to see that is searching in Lore for the number of the issue, e.g. https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/?q=1217

There was a patch sent, but it was not properly formatted (and it seems it didn't reach the list), and I don't think we heard again about it...

So if you have something, I would say go for it.

Thanks!

Hey Miguel,
Thank you for being an awesome maintainer of the project. I really want to make an impact here to the community and the project. I will be submitting patches soon.
This topic was moved here from #General > 1217 by Onur Özkan.
Here is my first patch to the linux kernel.
shivamklr has marked this topic as resolved.
